title: Benchmark Story
description: A single test story for plugin benchmark evaluation

description.description: Full problem description as a developer would write it

target_project.description: Name of the sample project to run against

test_command.description: Command to run tests (e.g., npm test)

build_command.description: Command to run build (e.g., npm run build)

files_affected.description: Expected files to be modified (for validation)

setup_commands.description: Commands to run before story execution (e.g., seed data)

complexity_notes.description: Notes on what makes this story this tier

expected_skills.description: Skills expected to fire during this story (for discipline scoring)

tags.description: Tags for filtering (e.g., tdd, bugfix, feature, refactor)
